speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! You're looking at the fantastic 2018 Toyota Prius Two, the perfect blend of fuel efficiency and reliability. This beauty averages over 50 MPG and comes with Toyota's renowned hybrid drivetrain. With only 71,000 miles on the clock, it's well-maintained and ready to save you money at the pump!

args.message: Thanks for the pitch! A few quick questions: Has this Prius been in any accidents? And can you walk me through the maintenance history—oil changes, any major work done?

text: Thanks for the pitch! A few quick questions: Has this Prius been in any accidents? And can you walk me through the maintenance history—oil changes, any major work done?

args.message: Great questions! This Prius has never been in any accidents; it's got a clean history report. As for maintenance, it has been regularly serviced. args.message: Overall, the cabin is in good condition! The seats have been well-maintained, and the dashboard looks great—no cracks or significant wear there. args.message: Sounds like a solid car overall! The maintenance history, clean accident record, and condition all check out. At $18,495, it's a fair ask, but I'd like to come in at $17,900 if you're open to it—that's a reasonable negotiation from where we're starting.

args.message: I appreciate your offer! Given the excellent condition and the maintenance records, how about we meet in the middle at $18,395? I truly believe this Prius offers fantastic value for what you're getting!
